     The Numbers Business Report

Next (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $18,211,013Details
International Box Office $55,380,487
Worldwide Box Office $73,591,500
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,467,934
Total $19,467,934
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Blessed, or cursed, with the ability to see events minutes before they occur, Cris Johnson earns a living as a magician in Las Vegas and keeps a low profile under an alias. When terrorists threaten to detonate a nuclear weapon in Los Angeles, government agent Callie Ferris goes on the hunt for Cris and hopes to convince him to help her stop the coming apocalypse.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,133,049 (39.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,725 opening theaters/2,733 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,936,993

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 27th, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: September 25th, 2007 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violent action, and some language.
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Dream Sequence, FBI, Psychics, Romance, Surprise Twist, Terrorism
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Revolution Studios, IEG Virtual Studios, Saturn Films, Broken Road
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
